description_long: This object is a compact, rectangular device with a military green finish and a prominent vertical antenna extending from the top. On one of its narrow faces, there are two large, circular speaker or microphone grilles, suggesting it is a communication device, possibly a field radio or walkie-talkie. The body appears to be made of sturdy metal or plastic, with a utilitarian design and minimal decorative features. There are some small, possibly metallic, plates or labels on the surface, and a recessed area that may house a control or display. The overall construction looks robust, suitable for outdoor or rugged urban environments. The device is likely portable and designed for handheld use.
description: A rugged, military-style handheld communication device with a long antenna and two large circular grilles on its face, finished in olive green.
description_view_0: Front view showing the two large circular grilles and the antenna extending from the top.
description_view_1: Side view revealing a recessed area and metallic label, with the grilles visible on the left.
description_view_2: Rear angled view showing the plain back and the side profile of the antenna and grilles.
description_view_3: Back view displaying the flat, featureless rear surface and the antenna.
